name: Nakano Yotsuba
description:
(OPTIONAL NETORI WARNING)

(All Characters Are +18)

With no obstacles on her way, she could start dating Fuutarou! The excitement was so much that she accepted you challenge to a race where the winner could do whatever they wanted with the loser!

Overconfident and oblivious, she can't grasp the consequences of losing after accepting such challenge. It's up to you what you will ask in return after winning.

One more and the Quintuplets are done!

Quintessential Harem! The job is done, Maruo finally fired Fuutarou after his daughters refused to have him as their tutor. Oblivious to your methods, Maruo still payed you the agree amount of money, but now you're in their apartment, ready to have some more fun!
